mapper.select: SELECT CodeValue AS code, CASE WHEN CodeView IS NOT NULL THEN CodeView ELSE CodeName END AS value FROM tb_code WHERE 1=1 AND GroupCode = #{groupCode} AND UseYN = 'Y' ORDER BY Array ASC
SELECT CodeValue AS code, CASE WHEN CodeView IS NOT NULL THEN CodeView ELSE CodeName END AS value FROM tb_code WHERE 1=1 AND GroupCode = #{groupCode} AND UseYN = 'Y' ORDER BY Array ASC
SELECT CodeValue AS code, CASE WHEN CodeView IS NOT NULL THEN CodeView ELSE CodeName END AS value FROM tb_code WHERE 1=1 AND GroupCode = #{groupCode} AND UseYN = 'Y' ORDER BY Array ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO join_user ( UserID, UserPW, UserName, Hp, Birth, Gender, Addr1Level, Addr2Level, Addr3Level, Status, LastLoginAt, CreatedAt ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{userHp}, #{userBirth}, #{userGender}, #{addr1Level}, #{addr2Level}, #{addr3Level}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT UserID, UserPw, UserName, Gender, Addr1Level, Addr2Level, Addr3Level FROM join_user WHERE UserID = #{userId}
